signal_points: Bitcoin price weakness is pressuring miner profitability, but hashprice remains stable.
BMN fleet growth continues, outperforming the network average.
STRC trading at par suggests strong investor confidence in miner performance.

signals.btc_price: BTC price fell 5.3% to $66,575, increasing pressure on miner margins.
signals.hashprice: Hashprice at $32.2/PH/day offers a stable revenue floor for efficient miners.
signals.difficulty: Flat difficulty suggests stable network conditions, intensifying competition.
signals.bmn_revenue: BMN daily revenue of ₿8.035532 indicates solid operational output.
signals.strc: STRC at $99.97 near par and 4.9x BTC rating shows strong miner valuation.
signals.bmn_hashrate: BMN hashrate at 27.833 EH/s with 69,365 active miners shows significant fleet expansion.
